title: Oman’s Bank Nizwa proposes Alizz merger; Ominvest to take 20% stake
summary: Bank Nizwa will also issue an AT1 perpetual sukuk to finance the deal
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Good deal. Close-up of two business people shaking hands while sitting at the working place. Image used for illustrative purpose. Image courtesy: Getty Images/ Witthaya Prasongsin

Bank Nizwa will also issue an AT1 perpetual sukuk to finance the deal

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

Oman’s Bank Nizwa has proposed a merger with Alizz Islamic Bank, while bringing Oman International Development and Investment Company (Ominvest) on board as a strategic stakeholder.
